_publications._publicationTitle: Microarray analyses reveal regional astrocyte heterogeneity with implications for neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1)-regulated glial proliferation.

_contextSnippet: In all cases, neurofibromin levels were undetectable in astroglial cells infected with Ad5-Cre compared to Ad5-LacZ (data not shown).
details: Neurofibromin levels were undetectable in astroglial cells infected with Ad5-Cre compared to Ad5-LacZ
